markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and decide on a mid-partnership optimization strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** Organic traffic is hockey-sticking (1k→30k daily impressions since Sept), validating the high-volume content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** A content refresh is now the priority to maximize ROI from the 92 published articles, moving from a "shooting from the hip" approach to strategic optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [**Execution:** GrowthX will audit all content to scope the refresh effort. New content will continue next week to maintain momentum, with the audit findings determining the long-term mix of new vs. refreshed articles.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Future Tactics:** Tavrn's new case studies are a key asset for organic growth. GrowthX also proposed a separate glossary project for traffic and lower-friction CTAs (e.g., templates) to improve conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy Pivot

  - [**Performance:** The high-volume strategy is working, with 92 articles published and consistent week-over-week growth in sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [**Organic Traffic Growth (Sept→Jan):**](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [Daily Impressions: 1,000 → 30,000](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [Engaged Sessions: Growing steadily](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Rationale for Pivot:** The current "shooting from the hip" approach was effective for learning, but a refresh is now needed to maximize ROI from existing assets.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [**Refresh Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [**Improve Top Performers:** Optimize high-traffic articles to "squeeze more juice" out of them.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
      - [**Salvage Underperformers:** Rework or prune articles on page 2 of Google that aren't landing.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Enhance Site Health:** Add forward-looking internal links to older content, creating new user pathways and signaling site structure to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### Execution Plan & Communication

  - [**Plan:** GrowthX will audit all 92 articles to scope the refresh effort.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**Cadence:** New content will continue next week to maintain momentum. The audit's findings will then determine the long-term mix of new vs. refreshed articles.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Communication:** Megan agreed to the plan. Matt will prepare a performance recap for Pedro to proactively address any concerns about pausing new content.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

### Future Content & Conversion Tactics

  - [**Case Studies:** Tavrn has two case studies ready and a third pending.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
      - [**Status:** Approved for public use on the website.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** "Gold dust" for organic growth. Can be used as blog content, embedded CTAs, or a soft conversion event before a demo.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [**Glossary Project:** Proposed as a separate, programmatic SEO workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Drive traffic and build domain authority without cluttering the main blog.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
      - [**Scope:** \~100–150 terms identified.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Format:** Un-gated, definitional content structured for AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [**Templated Pages:** Proposed as a custom project.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [**Purpose:** A powerful conversion tool (e.g., a free demand letter template) that lowers the barrier to entry compared to a "request a demo" CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
      - [Conduct the full content audit to scope the refresh effort.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [Send the performance recap to Pedro.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [Share the glossary topic list with Megan.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [Research and share high-profile personal injury case ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [**Megan (Tavrn):**](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
      - [Send the two completed case studies to Matt.](https://fathom.video/share/5zsHpJPfizhR-zKRk7J6FCJJx2uaJmW-?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
